description: Fix family data detection and parsing: improve combined data detection to catch ' - ' separator patterns and empty sibling slots, filter non-family lines, and handle other combined columns like emergency contacts.
steps: Improve familyNeedsParsing detection: also detect if keluarga[0].nama contains ' - ' pattern (indicating combined data with separators), and if keluarga[1].nama is empty while keluarga[0].nama has substantial content (all data went to first slot)

In parseMultilineFamily(), add filtering to skip lines that don't match family data pattern (e.g., lines like 'Saya tertarik dengan...' that don't start with '- ' AND don't contain at least one ' - ' separator)
Update the collision detection in post-processing to use the same enhanced heuristic for determining if combined family data source should be used
Check for and handle other combined columns that might need splitting (emergency contact data stacked in one cell)
Ensure after the fix, work and family post-processing correctly resets and fills slots from parsed data even without newline detection
acceptance_criteria: familyNeedsParsing triggers when keluarga[0].nama contains ' - ' separator pattern even without newlines
familyNeedsParsing triggers when keluarga[0].nama has content but keluarga[1].nama is empty (indicating all data went to first slot)
parseMultilineFamily filters out non-family lines that don't match expected patterns
Emergency contact combined data is detected and parsed when stacked in one cell
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run 'npm run build' in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal and confirm it succeeds with exit code 0
